records.ety: [L. coriandrum, fr. Gr. <?/<?/<?/<?/, <?/<?/<?/<?/, perh. fr. <?/<?/<?/ bug, on account of the buglike or fetid smell of its leaves: cf. F. coriandre.]

defs: An umbelliferous plant, the Coriandrum sativum, the fruit or seeds of which have a strong smell and a spicy taste, and in medicine are considered as stomachic and carminative.
